text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Committee Member A
text_block_list.text:
We can't have a Fan Fest without<n>food stalls!
We need booths that sell<n>things like drinks and
desserts!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear voices coming from a<n>classroom, and
when I take a peek<n>inside, I see a group of
students avidly<n>planning for the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Committee Member B
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I suppose we could play<n>it safe and
do a class cafe, but what<n>do you think, Pearl?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... That might not be so bad, but<n>what we
really need is something<n>fans can't experience
anywhere else.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Since they're coming out all this way,<n>shouldn't
we treat them to something<n>special?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: We must widen our minds and beflexible with our ideas! It's not enoughto just think outside the box—we haveto think over and beyond thebox!

text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Committee Member A
text_block_list.text:
Treat them to something special...<n>Yeah, that
would definitely make<n>things more interesting!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Seeking the Pearl's rallying call<n>inspires the rest
of the students, and<n>they begin to excitedly
discuss their<n>ideas for the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Okay, how about doing an<n>Uma-powered
merry-go-round?! We<n>can make a ride that we
manually<n>push in circles! What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Committee Member B
text_block_list.text:
Why stop there? Let's add similar<n>rides, like
Uma-powered spinning<n>cups!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Do you have something to add?<n>Go ahead,
we're all ears.
choice_data_list: Won't it be hard to implement?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Do you have something to add?<n>Go ahead,
we're all ears.
choice_data_list: Won't it be hard to implement?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it won't be easy, but it's not<n>impossible to
bring to life either.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
We just have to think of a way we<n>can we make
this dream into a reality!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
As long as we all put our heads<n>together, I'm
sure we can find a way!<n>I have no doubt
everything'll turn out<n>great!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I wouldn't have been able to<n>think of it if
not for how inspired I was<n>by everyone's ideas.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
There's a spark of the most<n>wonderful potential
within each and<n>every one of them.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
If we all work hard together, I'm sure<n>we can
make this Fan Fest the best in<n>history!
